rationale: A user executed 'reg.exe' to modify the 'Start' value of the 'EventLog' service to '4' (disabled) (EV-001, A0). While 'reg.exe' is a legitimate tool, disabling the EventLog service is highly suspicious as it can be used to hinder forensic analysis and hide malicious activity. The command was executed from a 'Downloads' directory, which is also suspicious.
